product: Chat in Genie One is now in Public Preview
tagline: Chat in Genie One has moved from Beta to Public Preview.
what_it_does: Chat in Genie One has moved from Beta to Public Preview. Chat provides a unified, full screen interface for asking data questions in natural language. It uses existing Genie spaces, dashboards, and queries to answer questions with your organization's data.
why_it_matters: This generates more accurate responses and reduces latency by reducing the amount of data Genie One needs to crawl and query.
plain_summary: Chat in Genie One has moved from Beta to Public Preview. Chat provides a unified, full screen interface for asking data questions in natural language.
key_takeaway: Chat in Genie One has moved from Beta to Public Preview.
